headline: Is Capital One Financial (COF) A Bargain On Its Discover Deal Or Fully Priced?
summary: Capital One Financial (COF) is back in focus after agreeing to acquire Discover Financial, a move that would give the bank direct ownership of a major payment network and reshape its position in card processing. See our latest analysis for Capital One Financial. Recent trading reflects this mix of excitement and caution, with Capital One Financial’s share price up 12.30% over the past month but down 18.17% year to date. Meanwhile, the three year total shareholder return of 89.76% contrasts...

headline: Wall Street Banks Weigh Buying Card Payment Network to Escape Fee Caps
summary: The Electronic Payments Coalition has said issuers have lost tens of billions in revenue because of the interchange fee cap.
